name: nf-core-tools
description: nf-core plugin for pipeline linting, schema checks, and Nextflow workflow guardrails.

interface.shortDescription: Run nf-core lint and policy checks fast.
interface.longDescription: Provides reusable nf-core lint, schema, and changelog guardrails across Codex, Claude, and Cursor.
defaultPrompt: Run all nf-core hooks with prek and summarize failures.
Run only the failing hook by id and show precise fixes.
Check Nextflow config vs schema drift and fix mismatches.
